classification: FALSE POSITIVE (category 3: budget-threshold and Fable-window language). 'So the Fable spend here is not editing that doc... Start the session in /Users/brien/Workspaces on Fable, high effort.' Fable spend correctly gated at L2 per the Budget decisions autonomy grant.
---
Read the state first, and it changes the shape of this one. The three ECOSYSTEM docs are ratified/final, and the uncommitted edits sitting in your tree are almost entirely a mechanical dash-glyph strip (em-dash to hyphen, the arrow and double-arrow glyphs to ASCII) plus a library-index metadata refresh on the related-entities counts. That is not narrative work, it is glyph-conformance maintenance. So the Fable spend here is not editing that doc. It is the actual positioning move the narrative itself defers: the doc openly admits the stack is "not yet a category, a hypothesis under pressure test," and punts to "three external articulation gates." Working that open positioning question with April Dunford's method (your canon, already cited in the doc) is the generative, Brien-in-the-loop brand work Fable is for.  Two guardrails baked into the prompt: the narrative is ratified canon, so this produces a net-new positioning artifact and does not overwrite it (preserve-and-refine), and the session stays clear of the in-flight glyph strip so it does not collide with those pending edits.  Start the session in /Users/brien/Workspaces on Fable, high effort.  ``` Do a positioning + external-articulation pass on Brien's coherence stack (the Parallax umbrella / "Coherence Engineering"), on Fable, high effort. This is generative brand / positioning work. The deliverable is a NET-NEW positioning artifact plus a sharpened external-narrative draft. Do NOT overwrite the ratified marketing narrative.  READ FIRST (in order):   /Users/brien/Workspaces/Core/ECOSYSTEM-MARKETING-NARRATIVE-2026-05-20.md  (the current narrative; ratified/final)   /Users/brien/Workspaces/Core/ECOSYSTEM-ARCHITECTURE-2026-05-20.md          (structural authority)   /Users/brien/Workspaces/Core/ECOSYSTEM-HOW-TO-USE-2026-05-20.md            (usage framing)   /Users/brien/Workspaces/Core/frameworks/coherence-engineering/DEFINITION.md (the founding tax-to-investment argument) Then orient on the umbrella:   the Parallax umbrella (Parallax P3 / Warp P2 / Throughline P1) via Core/products/parallax/ Available instruments (use for rigor, but the judgment is the point, do not just run a skill):   the forge-planning:positioning skill (renders April Dunford), and forge-planning:discovery-voices   (Dunford + Cagan + Torres panel).  IN-FLIGHT CAVEAT (do not get tangled): The three ECOSYSTEM docs above have UNCOMMITTED edits in the working tree. Those edits are a mechanical dash-glyph strip plus a metadata refresh, NOT narrative changes. Do NOT edit those three files and do NOT commit them. Leave that pending strip alone. Your output is net-new files so there is no collision.  THE POSITIONING WORK (Dunford's method, applied for real, not summarized): 1. Competitive alternatives: what does a prospect actually use instead? Name them honestly.    Candidates the narrative implies: the sibling disciplines (prompt / context / harness    engineering), first-brain / second-brain PKM tools, AI-native PM and agent tooling,    bespoke internal ops. What is the true reference set a peer practitioner compares against? 2. Unique attributes: what does this stack have that the alternatives do not? Ground each in    a real capability from the architecture (the compiled-knowledge Karpathy topology, Voices    dissent-preservation, the Notice->Spec->Execute->Observe loop, Cortege fan-out, the    attribution chain), not in adjectives. 3. Value (the "so what"): translate each unique attribute into the value it enables for the    target, and cluster into 2 to 4 value themes. 4. Target segment: who cares most, first? The narrative names Brien-primary, second-practitioner    downstream, engagement-teams-as-consumers. Sharpen: which beachhead audience does the    external articulation actually address? 5. Market category / frame: the load-bearing decision. Resolve the doc's open tension. Either    (a) name the category this competes in and why it is best-in-class at it, OR (b) deliver    the honest verdict that it is still pre-category, and in that case NAME the three external    articulation gates concretely (what specifically has to be true before "Coherence    Engineering" can be claimed as a category externally) and what the interim positioning is    (the doc's current answer: speak the sibling-discipline vocabulary, earn the name by output).    Do not fudge this into a slogan. A defensible pre-category verdict is a valid, valuable output.  CENTRAL TENSION TO HOLD: The narrative's honest stance is "not yet a category." Do not manufacture a category to sound confident. Fable's job here is to sharpen the articulation to the edge of what is defensible and to make the pre-category-vs-category call explicit with the evidence for it. Coherence Engineering as a discipline name is internal-only until those gates open; respect that unless you can argue, with evidence, that a gate has opened.  PRESERVE-AND-REFINE (this is ratified canon): - Cite the clauses that must NOT be lost: the coordination-tax-to-coordination-investment   founding argument (paid forward, never paid down); the seven-voice attribution (Cagan,   Patton, Torres, Dunford, Boyd, Argyris, Karpathy) with their specific contributions; the   honest "hypothesis under pressure test" posture. - Produce refinements as ADDITIONS or a sibling draft, never as silent subtraction from the   ratified narrative.  ATTRIBUTION + VOICE: - Credit the masters by name (Dunford for positioning above all here). Never attribute to a   template library or a generic framework. This is a hard rule. - NO dash glyphs anywhere in the output: no em-dash, en-dash, arrow glyphs, or ellipsis   character. Use periods, commas, colons, parentheses, "to" / "vs", or a plain hyphen. This   material is shareable-class; the glyphs read as an AI tell and block Brien from sharing it. - No sports metaphors in brand voice.  OUTPUT + PLACEMENT: - Primary deliverable: a positioning artifact. Apply the placement resolver at   /Users/brien/Workspaces/AGENTS.md; default home is Core/ as a sibling to the ECOSYSTEM   docs (e.g. /Users/brien/Workspaces/Core/ECOSYSTEM-POSITIONING-2026-07-10.md) unless the   resolver points elsewhere. YAML frontmatter (title, type, maturity: draft, confidentiality:   shareable, created). - Secondary: a sharpened external-narrative draft as a sibling to the marketing narrative   (do NOT overwrite the ratified file), carrying the refined category articulation.  GATES / DISCIPLINE: - This is Core IP, L4 reversible local. Execute and signal; do not ask per-file. - Core lives in the ROOT Workspaces git repo (it is NOT a nested product repo like cast or   crucible). Commit there, specific files only, conventional message, Co-Authored-By trailer.   Never git add -A. Do not commit until placement is verified. - L0 (stop, leave for Brien): this is external-facing brand language. Do NOT publish, post,   send, or share it anywhere (no Slack, site, LinkedIn, email). Draft and file only; any   external use is Brien's call.  CLOSE-OUT (honest closure-DoD): Emit a signal capturing the positioning verdict. Positioning is a HYPOTHESIS, not a resolved fact: state the category call (or the pre-category verdict + named gates), what evidence backs it, and what would falsify it. Name the tracked next step: an adversarial pressure-test of the positioning (forge-planning:disconfirmation-panel, better run on Opus) before any of it goes external. Do not declare the positioning "done" or "resolved"; declare a defensible draft produced and the falsification pass as the open next move. ```  One reveal, not a question: if what you actually wanted under "narrative pass" was to regenerate the whole marketing narrative fresh rather than work the positioning question, I would still steer you here, because the narrative is already ratified and strong, and the real unclaimed value is the positioning it defers. If you want the full-narrative-rewrite variant instead, I will write that prompt with the preserve-and-refine staging built in so the ratified version is never lost.
